name: agl-hostman + Turbo Flow v4.0
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y tmux htop && cd ${containerWorkspaceFolder} && git clone -b main --depth 1 https://github.com/marcuspat/turbo-flow tf-src && cp -r tf-src/devpods . && rm -rf tf-src && chmod +x devpods/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true && [ -f devpods/setup.sh ] && ./devpods/setup.sh && for f in /home/vscode/.zshrc /root/.zshrc; do touch "$f" 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'zshrc-openclaw.env' "$f" 2>/dev/null || (echo '' >> "$f" && echo '# Claude-Flow + LiteLLM (cclitellm)' >> "$f" && echo '[[ -f "$WORKSPACE_FOLDER/config/openclaw/zshrc-openclaw.env" ]] && source "$WORKSPACE_FOLDER/config/openclaw/zshrc-openclaw.env" && cclitellm' >> "$f") && break; done
postStartCommand: echo '✅ Container started, Turbo Flow + agl-hostman ready'
